items.title: Binary classifier benchmarking
items.description: Compare candidate models on validation ROC-AUC before hyperparameter freeze — standard in tabular ML competitions and internal bake-offs.

items.title: Fraud and abuse detection
items.description: Rank transactions by risk score; AUC validates separability while operations later sets a threshold for block vs review vs allow.

items.title: Medical diagnostic scoring
items.description: Risk calculators output continuous scores; regulators and clinicians use ROC-AUC to compare tests, then pick cutoffs for sensitivity/specificity targets.

items.title: Marketing propensity models
items.description: P(response|customer) scores feed campaign targeting; AUC measures list ranking quality independent of the spend-driven contact threshold.

items.title: Neural binary classification heads
items.description: Deep models with sigmoid outputs use validation AUC during training checkpoints — same ROC framework as logistic regression at scale.
